content.text: [{"评论产品的属性":"Size=Shell S3;Color=Black","评论日期":"20250131","评星":5,"标题":"Great family karaoke","评论":"This Karaoke machine is durable, wireless, portable, compact, has good sound and a color video screen. My grandchildren, nieces and nephews had a blast on Thanksgiving and were singing for hours."},{"评论产品的属性":"Size=Shell S3;Color=Black","评论日期":"20250201","评星":4,"标题":"Worth the price","评论":"For the size and features, it is totally worth the price. The bluetooth connection worked well and the built-in screen made lyrics easy to follow."},{"评论产品的属性":"Size=Shell S3;Color=Black","评论日期":"20250202","评星":3,"标题":"Good but battery could be better","评论":"The sound is good and kids loved it, but the battery did not last through the whole party."}]
